assertions.description: All 6 CNY70 sensors correctly parsed with subcircuit neighbor analysis showing the 82-ohm LED driver resistors and 10k pull-up resistors. The 4053 triple analog mux with sensor inputs and line select outputs is correctly mapped. Component count (17), net count (28), and BOM all correct.

The CD4053 (triple 2:1 analog mux) driving a 6-sensor array into 3 multiplexed output lines is a recognizable sensor multiplexing pattern. The analyzer has no mux/switch IC detector, so it only appears in subcircuits. Not a critical gap but a missed opportunity for a more informative output.
